data.title: Implement ticket-clarity-check.sh + config key
data.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-clarity-check.sh implementing SC2 heuristic scoring.

## Script Interface
Two modes:
1. ticket-clarity-check.sh <ticket-id> — calls .claude/scripts/dso ticket show, extracts data
2. ticket-clarity-check.sh --stdin — reads JSON ticket data from stdin (testing mode per contract)

## Scoring Rules (SC2)
- Section headers (## lines present): +1
- Description length >=200 chars: +1
- Description length >=500 chars: +1 additional
- Bullet/checkbox lists (- or - [ ] lines): +1
- Type-specific bonuses:
  - task: Acceptance Criteria section +2, file paths +1
  - story: Why/What sections +2, Scope section +1
  - bug: Reproduction Steps +2, expected-vs-actual +1
  - epic: Success Criteria section +2, Context +1

## Output (per contract Task 0)
JSON stdout: {"score": N, "verdict": "pass|fail", "threshold": T}
Exit: 0=pass, 1=fail, 2=error

## Config
Add clarity_check.pass_threshold=5 to .claude/dso-config.conf
Minimum valid threshold: 1 (enforce floor)

## .test-index
Remove RED marker [test_empty_description] from .test-index entry.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-clarity-check.sh
- [ ] Script outputs valid JSON via --stdin
  Verify: echo '{"ticket_type":"epic","description":"test"}' | $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-clarity-check.sh --stdin 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); assert 'score' in d and 'verdict' in d and 'threshold' in d"
- [ ] Config key exists
  Verify: grep -q "clarity_check.pass_threshold" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep "ticket-clarity-check" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "\["; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
